query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM professors) as total_professors,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM professors WHERE image_url IS NOT NULL) as with_image,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM professors WHERE image_url IS NULL) as without_image,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM university_field_images) as field_images,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT university_name) FROM professors) as universities;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute 
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM professors) as total_professors,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM professors WHERE image_url IS NOT NULL) as with_image,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM professors WHERE image_url IS NULL) as without_image,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM university_field_images) as field_images,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT university_name) FROM professors) as universities;
